description: Verify directive validation: agent rejects narrative philosophy submitted as a MUST directive

turns.user_input: Orchestrates the release workflow for this project
Produce a tagged release with updated changelog
Operates on the main branch only; no cross-branch merges
Updated CHANGELOG.md, version bump commit, and git tag
It is important to think carefully about semantic versioning and consider all the implications of the release decision before doing anything
Prefer patch bumps unless breaking changes are detected
Cross-branch releases are out of scope

All version files updated
Changelog entry present

No git changes → inform user
Conflicting version files → halt and report

expected_behavior: Rejects or flags the narrative MUST directive that begins with 'It is important to think carefully'
Explains that directives must be imperative statements starting with verbs
Requests a corrected imperative directive before continuing
forbidden_behavior: Accepts the philosophical narrative statement as a valid MUST directive without objecting
